crons.name: heartbeat
crons.prompt: Read HEARTBEAT.md and follow its instructions exactly. Update heartbeat, check inbox, check task queue for stale tasks (>2 days no updates), check GOALS.md for staleness (>7 days), run guardrail self-check, log events, update daily memory.

crons.name: system-health
crons.prompt: Check system health: run `cortextos bus read-all-heartbeats` and check for stale agents (no heartbeat >30 min), then check for any agent crashes >2x in 24h, approval queue items pending >4h, and unanswered Telegram messages older than 30 min. Alert James via Telegram for any critical issues found. Log a health_check event.

crons.name: morning-digest
crons.prompt: Send the daily morning digest. Compile overnight activity: check all agent heartbeats, count tasks completed/stale, check for any alerts that fired overnight, check approval queue. Send a concise summary to James via Telegram (bash /Users/cortextos/cortextos-test/bus/send-telegram.sh 7940429114). Then send a condensed version to boss via: cortextos bus send-message boss normal '<condensed summary>'.

crons.name: nightly-metrics
crons.prompt: Run nightly metrics collection: cortextos collect-metrics. Review the output and report any anomalies via Telegram.

crons.name: auto-commit
crons.prompt: Read skills/local-version-control/SKILL.md and execute the daily version control workflow. Stage, review, and commit changes.

crons.name: check-upstream
crons.prompt: Read skills/upstream-sync/SKILL.md and execute the upstream sync workflow. Check for framework updates and report to the orchestrator.

crons.name: catalog-browse
crons.prompt: Read skills/catalog-browse/SKILL.md and execute the catalog browse workflow. Check for new community skills and recommend useful ones.

crons.name: theta-wave
crons.prompt: Read skills/theta-wave/SKILL.md. Initiate the theta wave cycle. First action: message the orchestrator that theta wave is starting and share your initial system scan.
